lesson.menu_desc: Go shopping and ask about prices: store, buy, price, money, cheap, expensive, size, pay -- the question code How much / How many -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 10 -- Shopping: At the Store
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 10 -- Shopping

listenings.text: Hi, my name is Mariana. Let me tell you about my morning at the store. I want to buy a new dress for a party. I see a beautiful red dress, but the price is very high. It is expensive: two hundred reais. So I ask the assistant: How much is the blue dress? The blue dress is cheap, only sixty reais. I am very happy. I pay with my card, and I buy the blue dress. Now I have a new dress for the party.

Hello, I am Gustavo. On Saturday I go to the market near my house. I like the market because the food is cheap. I buy bread, fruit and water for my family. I always ask the price first: How much is the bread? How many apples do you want? The man says four reais for the bread. I have a little money, so I buy only the things I need. The market is cheap, and I do not pay a lot. I am a smart shopper.

extra_audio.text: First, I go into the store. Second, I look at the shirts. Third, I ask how much the shirt is. Fourth, I pay with my card. Fifth, I take my new shirt home.
